category_sources: source_facts.description says RRDtool is a Round Robin Database; official documentation is for RRDtool and covers the rrdtool command family.

docs_sources: Official oss.oetiker.ch RRDtool documentation index is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/oetiker/rrdtool-1.x, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
